title: chore: 🧹 [code health improvement] Convert function documentation to JSDoc in nim.ts
body:
🎯 **What:** 
The code health issue flagged lines 453-456 in `src/lib/inference/nim.ts` as "Dead Code: Commented out logic". However, this block was actually a multi-line explanatory comment for `shouldShowNimLine`. This commit converts the standard `//` comment block into a proper JSDoc `/** ... */` block instead of deleting it.

💡 **Why:** 
This improves maintainability and readability by providing structured documentation for the `shouldShowNimLine` exported function, preserving valuable context about edge cases while eliminating the false positive from code health analyzers that misidentify the block as commented-out logic.

✅ **Verification:** 
Ran `npm run verify:core` and `npm run lint` successfully. Verified that no execution logic was changed.

✨ **Result:** 
The code now has proper JSDoc commenting, removing the false positive code health issue while preserving critical context.

Signed-off-by: Jules <jules@example.com>
